headline: Shoes File for Divorce From Socks Citing 'Irreconcilable Stink Differences'
summary: Footwear courts overwhelmed with similar cases.
fullBody: In what experts are calling 'the Great Footwear Split,' millions of shoes are seeking independence. 'I can't live like this anymore,' said one sneaker through tears (sweat). Sock manufacturers are offering couples counseling in the form of odor eaters.
